allow: Bash(python -c "from app.api.endpoints import templates, auth; print\('Imports OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from docling_core.types.doc import DoclingDocument; import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(DoclingDocument.__init__\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from docling.document_converter import DocumentConverter; import inspect; sig = inspect.signature\(DocumentConverter.convert\); print\('convert returns:', sig.return_annotation\)")

Bash(python -c "from docling.datamodel.document import ConversionResult; print\('document field type hint:'\); import typing; print\(typing.get_type_hints\(ConversionResult\) if hasattr\(typing, 'get_type_hints'\) else 'use inspect'\)")
